title: 48-Month Extension / SEH
desc: You are approaching 48 months of benefits and need an extension to graduate.

fields.name: monthsUsed
fields.label: Months of Entitlement Used So Far

fields.name: hasSeh
fields.label: Has the VRC declared you have a Serious Employment Handicap (SEH)?

fields.name: extensionReason
fields.label: Reason extension is needed to complete plan
fields.placeholder: e.g. Double major required to secure suitable entry-level placement

errors: Asserting that the 48-month limit is a hard statutory cap that can never be extended.
Claiming VREO signature is always required when extension concurrence was legally delegated under the 2024 final rule.
